tools.name: github_search_prs
tools.description: Search pull requests by repository, state, author, review status, or CI terms.
examples: find open pull requests with failing CI

tools.name: github_fetch_workflow_logs
tools.description: Fetch GitHub Actions workflow jobs, steps, and logs for a failing commit or pull request.
examples: debug a failed GitHub Actions check
show logs for a failed CI job

tools.name: filesystem_read
tools.description: Read local project files, list directories, and inspect source code.
examples: list source files in this project

tools.name: python_unittest
tools.description: Run Python unit tests with the standard unittest runner.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the public web for current facts, documentation, news, prices, or citations.
examples: look up the latest model documentation

tools.name: image_generate
tools.description: Generate or edit bitmap images from a visual prompt or reference image.
